notes: v362 — SORRY, MY FIX WENT TOO FAR: 'Show all' now shows ALL your shares again. My last update wrongly capped it at 500 to keep things fast — that was the wrong call; the full market (all 4,000+ shares) loads again when you tap 'Show all'. It's still faster than before the speed work (the scroll-shadow fix and bigger render batches stayed in). A very large list still takes a few seconds to finish filling — the top rows show instantly and the rest stream in behind them — so 🔍 search, a 📡 Radar tile, or a column sort is the quickest way to jump to a specific share. I also asked your browser to KEEP your saved offline data instead of clearing it to free space (if your downloaded shares ever vanished, that browser 'eviction' is the usual cause — protect it further with Export saved data to file and by installing the app to your home screen). The default view still shows the top 120 (60 on phone) for a fast first paint, with 'Show all' for the rest. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load v362.
